items.title_en: Magyar meets Hungarian president as Trump says next PM 'a good man'
items.title_zh: 马扎尔会见匈牙利总统，特朗普称下一任总理是“好人”
items.desc_en: The man who ended Viktor Orbán's 16 years of continuous rule, Péter Magyar, is calling for a speedy transfer of power.
items.desc_zh: 结束维克托·欧尔班 16 年连续统治的人彼得·马扎尔 (Péter Magyar) 呼吁迅速移交权力。

items.title_en: Luxury stocks fall as Iran war weighs on earnings; Hermes sinks 14%
items.title_zh: 由于伊朗战争影响盈利，奢侈品股下跌；爱马仕下跌 14%
items.desc_en: Hermes said wholesale activity was "significantly affected" in the first quarter by lower sales to concession stores, particularly in the Middle East and in airports.
items.desc_zh: 爱马仕表示，第一季度批发活动受到特许商店销售额下降的“严重影响”，特别是在中东和机场。

items.title_en: Australian pleads guilty to creating deepfake porn in landmark case
items.title_zh: 澳大利亚人承认在具有里程碑意义的案件中制作深度伪造色情内容
items.desc_en: The 19-year-old is the first person to be charged under a new national law.
items.desc_zh: 这位 19 岁的男子是第一个根据新的国家法律受到指控的人。

items.title_en: Why Wells Fargo says it might be time to take profits on energy — even as the bank hikes its oil price forecasts

items.desc_en: Oil prices are likely to remain well above their levels prior to the Iran war, the consequences of which have choked global supply for the foreseeable future.
items.desc_zh: 油价可能仍远高于伊朗战争前的水平，其后果在可预见的未来抑制了全球供应。

items.title_en: Chip giant ASML raises 2026 guidance as AI semiconductor demand stays strong
items.title_zh: AI半导体需求保持强劲，芯片巨头ASML上调2026年业绩指引

items.title_en: European markets eye mixed open as traders assess Iran war latest
items.title_zh: 交易员评估伊朗战争最新情况，欧洲市场开盘喜忧参半
items.desc_en: European stocks are expected to open in mixed territory on Wednesday as regional traders assess the trajectory of the U.S.-Iran war.
items.desc_zh: 由于地区交易员评估美伊战争的轨迹，预计欧洲股市周三开盘涨跌互现。

items.title_en: Samsung SDS shares jump 20% on KKR partnership and $820 million bond purchase

items.desc_zh: KKR & Co 已同意收购三星 SDS 新发行的 8.2 亿美元可转换债券，该交易将建立新的战略合作伙伴关系。

items.desc_zh: 警方称阿什莉·罗宾逊（Ashly Robinson，网名阿什莉·杰娜）在试图自杀后死亡。

items.desc_zh: 他否认性侵犯指控，但承认“错误”并表示将辞职。

items.desc_zh: 这位美国副总统表示，匈牙利领导人是一位“伟大的人”，做得“非常好”，但他确信自己可以与彼得·马扎尔合作。
